---
name: Hidden input or smuggled tuning
about: You believe a claimed "output" is actually an input, is derivable from another output, or was tuned to data.
title: "[HIDDEN-INPUT] <output> is not independent / was tuned"
labels: over-determination, high-priority
---

<!-- This is the highest-value attack in the repository. If you are right, the central over-determination claim fails. -->

## The output in question
<!-- Which claimed-independent output (e.g. a Table 1 row, a specific predicted quantity). -->

## Your claim
- [ ] It is actually an **input** (a free degree of freedom presented as a result)
- [ ] It is **algebraically derivable** from the declared inputs or from another output (so it is not independent)
- [ ] It was **tuned to data** (compared before being frozen)

## The derivation / evidence
<!-- Show the algebra that makes it dependent, or the evidence that it was not frozen before comparison. Be specific. -->

## What this deflates
<!-- State how the output-to-input count changes if you are correct. -->

---
*If confirmed, this is recorded in `ERRATA.md` at `fatal` severity with your attribution, and the over-determination claim is corrected or withdrawn in public.*
